title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> This ensures urgency and scarcity dri
content:
✔ This ensures urgency and scarcity drive strategic play.

✅ Why This Works:
• Creates real stakes for item claims.
• Prevents students from hoarding XP for last-minute power plays.
• Adds a timed element, making participation more engaging.

📜 4. What Should the XP Leaders Unlock in the Final Week?

📜 Since “Legend Status” for future semesters isn’t enough, what is a practical reward?

✔ Option 1: “The Scholar’s Final Wish”
• The top XP student gets one wish granted within course rules.
• Example: They may revise a final grade, alter a project, or create a new challenge for the class.
• This makes them a true “game master” for one moment.

✔ Option 2: “The Master Key”
• The XP leader gains one-time access to the class’s hidden paths.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 250 (chunk 250/555)
